== Notes for [[Item:Q83690|Q83690]] ==

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hakim_ibn_Hizam

Source 2: http://www.alseraj.net/maktaba/kotob/english/kids/BeautifulString/Books/Incidents/113.htm

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
671E31426E6501EFBC189822EF79916CAEA1
geni:6000000015178384385

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
